headline: Are Consumer Discretionary Stocks Lagging  Hasbro (HAS) This Year?
summary: Here is how Hasbro (HAS) and Escalade (ESCA) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

headline: From trends to tattoos: Licensing festival BRANDmania kicks off with plenty of highlights
summary: When street performers, brands and the most exciting licensing themes unite, it's time for BRANDmania! On 24 and 25 June, Europe's largest B2B networking festival for licensing and partnerships will bring together the industry's key players at the Zeche Zollverein site in Essen. With an expanded programme, new interactive zones and participants from a wide range of sectors, the Spielwarenmesse Group is continuing its success story.
